title: Anonymous FTP Access Enabled
description: The FTP server (vsftpd 2.3.4) allows anonymous login. While anonymous access alone is medium severity, combined with the vsftpd backdoor this represents a significant attack surface.
evidence: FTP anonymous login test:\nCredentials anonymous@192.168.0.140:ftp: VALID (access: user)\nSuccessfully authenticated to FTP with anonymous:anonymous
remediation: Disable anonymous FTP access unless explicitly required. If needed, ensure the anonymous root directory has restricted permissions.
